# callables

**Instance Property**

The dictionary used during runtime to lookup the [doc://com.apple.metalperformanceshadersgraph/documentation/MetalPerformanceShadersGraph/MPSGraphExecutable] which correspond to the `symbolName`.

## Declaration

```swift
var callables: [String : MPSGraphExecutable]? { get set }
```
